name: pulseplay-desktop
description: PulsePlay desktop launcher / packaged local runtime. Boots the bundled app server + bundled proxy on random 127.0.0.1 ports, generates a one-time launch token, opens a private browser. DX1b proof; not yet packaged. See docs/DX1_LAUNCHER_CONTRACT.md.

scripts.package: node -e "console.error('packaging recipe is documented in PACKAGING.md; implementation lands in DX1c'); process.exit(1)"
